creator: i@levsha.me
text:
Guido Falsi wrote:
> Hi,
> 
> using ABI version numbers for libraries is discouraged whenever possible.
> 
> Are you sure that they are needed for the proj.7 and gps.20 depends?
> 
> Can you approve the attached patch?

Most likely version numbers is not needed here.
I approve this patch.
Thanks!
 
> BTW in this patch I also trimmed the headers as now required by portmgr:
> 
> http://blogs.freebsdish.org/portmgr/2012/09/17/change-to-the-header-in-ports-makefiles-take-two/
> 
> Thanks!
> 
> -- 
> Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>

> Index: Makefile
> ===================================================================
> --- Makefile	(revision 304517)
> +++ Makefile	(working copy)
> @@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
> -# New ports collection makefile for: qlandkartegt
> -# Date created:                1 Jun 2009
> -# Whom:                        Mykola Dzham <freebsd@levsha.org.ua>
> -#
> +# Created by: Mykola Dzham <freebsd@levsha.org.ua>
>  # $FreeBSD$
> -#
>  
>  PORTNAME=	qlandkartegt
> -PORTVERSION=	1.5.0
> +PORTVERSION=	1.5.1
>  CATEGORIES=	astro
>  MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/QLandkarteGT%20${PORTVERSION}
>  
> @@ -16,8 +12,8 @@
>  LICENSE=	GPLv2
>  
>  LIB_DEPENDS=	gdal:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/gdal \
> -		proj.7:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/proj \
> -		gps.20:${PORTSDIR}/astro/gpsd
> +		proj:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/proj \
> +		gps:${PORTSDIR}/astro/gpsd
>  
>  USE_CMAKE=	yes
>  USE_QT4=	dbus gui opengl network sql xml linguist_build \
> Index: distinfo
> ===================================================================
> --- distinfo	(revision 304517)
> +++ distinfo	(working copy)
> @@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
> -SHA256 (qlandkartegt-1.5.0.tar.gz) = 439137d4864217c350678d8357c07a0f80455f2cff35a736dd6b58a2d3d683b4
> -SIZE (qlandkartegt-1.5.0.tar.gz) = 6388844
> +SHA256 (qlandkartegt-1.5.1.tar.gz) = 095cd2390684eead61b2868e1efc85500d6d61e95f3d54d0fd255cd95f55aadd
> +SIZE (qlandkartegt-1.5.1.tar.gz) = 7113881
> Index: pkg-plist
> ===================================================================
> --- pkg-plist	(revision 304517)
> +++ pkg-plist	(working copy)
> @@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
>  share/pixmaps/qlandkartegt.png
>  %%DATADIR%%/translations/qlandkartegt_cs.qm
>  %%DATADIR%%/translations/qlandkartegt_de.qm
> +%%DATADIR%%/translations/qlandkartegt_en.qm
>  %%DATADIR%%/translations/qlandkartegt_es_ES.qm
>  %%DATADIR%%/translations/qlandkartegt_fr.qm
>  %%DATADIR%%/translations/qlandkartegt_it_IT.qm


--
